rulings.Case Title: JAMES CARTER ET AL VS. SOCO WEST, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 14, 2017 in Department 503, Line 1.
